subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God, and praise be unto Thee! Exalted is Thy power, sublime Thy sovereignty, manifest Thy proof, and evident Thy dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم و بحمدک جلت قدرتک و عظم سلطانک و وضح برهانک و ظهر سلطانک و سبقت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @love of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant
